summary: Iteration 6 (clinical reasoning layer) tested end-to-end on mobile 390x844. BACKEND: 31/31 pytest passing across test_player_api.py, test_iteration3_fields.py, and new test_iteration6_clinical_fields.py (added 10 tests covering learning_profile across all 5 new profile ids, enemy_mastery + chapter_progress create/update/persistence, default values for omitted fields, and backward-compat for legacy DB docs missing new fields — all PASS). FRONTEND ONBOARDING: full 7-step flow (welcome → name → quiz → result → goal → trial → battle) completes without crashes. ACCEPT SAGE correctly applied; all 5 LearningProfile cards render with the spec'd labels + sublabels: nonmedical / preNursing / nursingStudent / nclexPrep / healthcareProfessional. trial-enter routes to /battle?enemyId=air_sprite. BATTLE ITEMS GATING: confirmed working — vs Air Sprite, Bronchodilator Mist shows LOCKED badge ('Requires Wheezing') initially; after Pattern Sight reveals all visible+hidden clues (Wheezing appears in CLUES list), Bronchodilator Mist switches to RECOMMENDED badge with gold border. Glucose Spark Gel stays LOCKED (correct — Air Sprite has no Low Glucose clue to reveal). River Bolus stays LOCKED. Barrier Kit shows POOR FIT (orange) — matches expected behavior since infection-isolation actions are in air_sprite.inappropriateActionTags. Codex Lab Sigil (Scout item) renders unbadged = appropriate. CRITICAL BUG FOUND: server-seeded inventory uses OLD item names ('Albuterol Mist','Glucose Gel','Fluid Bolus','Isolation Kit','Lab Token') while the new clinical layer items use DIFFERENT names ('Bronchodilator Mist','Glucose Spark Gel','River Bolus','Barrier Kit','Codex Lab Sigil'). Result: every freshly created player sees ×0 of every battle item and CANNOT use any item in battle. UI screenshot at /tmp/items_tab.png confirms 5/5 items show ×0 immediately after onboarding. This blocks: (a) actually using Bronchodilator Mist to consume AP and reduce corruption (b) verifying full Scout→Stabilize→Counter→Reassess care chain with Bronchodilator as Counter step (c) verifying STAR RESULT SCREEN reward breakdown / 3-stars / +10 chain bonus because we cannot win efficiently. ACTIONS-tab badge inspection: the visible starter-team skills (Pattern Sight, Focused Lens, Guardian's Touch, Reassess) all rendered without status badges — this is correct per spec ('badge only when status ≠ appropriate') since these are universal Scout/Analyze/Stabilize/Reassess skills mapping to expected chain roles. Could NOT verify POOR FIT on Isolation Seal vs Air Sprite because Isolation Seal is not on a starter hero. CARE CHAIN log messages ('Clinical Chain advanced: Scout complete') were not visible on the battle screen after using Pattern Sight + Guardian's Touch — battle log may be off-screen or not rendered as inline text; reported as observation needing main-agent verification. Console warnings (carry-over): shadow* deprecated, props.pointerEvents deprecated, useNativeDriver fallback — all RN-web internals, non-blocking.

ui_bugs.issue: Every newly created player shows ×0 for ALL 5 battle items because server.py seeds inventory with legacy item-name keys that no longer match the clinical-layer item names. Tested after onboarding submit: GET /api/player returns inventory={Albuterol Mist:1, Glucose Gel:1, Fluid Bolus:1, Isolation Kit:1, Lab Token:2} but the Items tab renders {Bronchodilator Mist, Glucose Spark Gel, River Bolus, Barrier Kit, Codex Lab Sigil} with counts 0,0,0,0,0. Reference: /app/backend/server.py:131-137 vs ITEM_CLINICAL keys in /app/frontend/src/game/clinical.ts.

After Pattern Sight (Scout) + Guardian's Touch (Stabilize) + End Turn, no visible 'Clinical Chain advanced: Scout complete' / 'Stabilize complete' text was found anywhere in the battle screen DOM. Either the chain log is rendered off-screen, behind the CODEX accordion, or the message is not actually being generated. Reference: /app/frontend/app/battle.tsx (log render) + /app/frontend/src/game/battle.ts (canAdvanceChain / generateBattleMessage).

integration_issues.issue: Player completes onboarding into trial battle (air_sprite) but cannot use any item because starter inventory keys are mismatched with battle item keys. The locked-item-unlock flow (reveal Wheezing → Bronchodilator becomes RECOMMENDED) is wired correctly visually, but the item is unusable because ×0 in inventory. Tapping it should consume AP and reduce corruption — unverified due to ×0.

react_native_issues.issue: Carry-over warning: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow'. Reference: RN-web internals, non-blocking.
Carry-over warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Reference: RN-web internals, non-blocking.
Carry-over warning: 'useNativeDriver is not supported because the native animated module is missing. Falling back to JS-based animation'. Web preview only; non-blocking.

action_items: CRITICAL: Sync the starter inventory in /app/backend/server.py:131-137 with the new clinical-layer item names. Change keys to {'Bronchodilator Mist': N, 'Glucose Spark Gel': N, 'River Bolus': N, 'Barrier Kit': N, 'Codex Lab Sigil': N} (or whatever the canonical ITEM_CLINICAL keys are in /app/frontend/src/game/clinical.ts) so freshly created players actually receive usable battle items. Without this fix, items system is non-functional from the player's POV (every new run shows ×0 across the board).

Verify that the battle log ('Clinical Chain advanced: Scout complete', etc.) actually renders somewhere visible on /app/frontend/app/battle.tsx after each chain step. If it lives behind the CODEX collapsible, consider surfacing the latest log line as an inline toast.

After server inventory fix, retest the full Scout → Stabilize → Counter (Bronchodilator) → Reassess care-chain flow vs Air Sprite to confirm fullChain bonus = +10 shards, 3-star screen + checklist labels render, and the 'Base X · Stars +Y · Care Chain +Z' breakdown card shows the correct totals.
Confirm POOR FIT badge on Isolation Seal vs Air Sprite by seeding a player with a hero that owns Isolation Seal (not in starter team).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py PlayerCreate model accepts learning_profile but the create_player route does not validate it against the 5 known ids ('nonmedical','preNursing','nursingStudent','nclexPrep','healthcareProfessional'). Any string is accepted — non-blocking but adds drift risk.

server.py:131-137 hardcodes starter inventory keys. This is the source of the critical bug; the inventory keys should be sourced from a shared constants module (or at least mirrored to the frontend ITEM_CLINICAL definitions).

result.tsx looks correct: stars rendered with Ionicons star / star-outline, 3-line checklist (Stabilized / Completed the clinical care chain / Efficient and safe care) wired to starResult.stars index, shardsCard with 'Base · Stars · Care Chain' breakdown computed via calculateRewards(baseShards, starResult.stars, fullChainCompleted). All code paths look sound — but unverified end-to-end due to the inventory bug blocking efficient wins.

onboarding.tsx LEARNING_GOALS array correctly exposes 5 ids with the spec'd sublabels and depth mapping (nonmedical→simple, preNursing→foundation, nursingStudent→clinical, nclexPrep→nclex, healthcareProfessional→professional). Lint clean.

success_rate.backend: 100% (31/31 pytest pass; 10 new tests added for learning_profile + enemy_mastery + chapter_progress + legacy-doc backward-compat)
success_rate.frontend: ~70% (onboarding 5-profile rendering ✅, trial battle entry ✅, items-tab LOCKED gating ✅, RECOMMENDED upgrade after Wheezing reveal ✅, POOR FIT on Barrier Kit ✅, Glucose Spark Gel stays LOCKED vs Air ✅; BLOCKED: actual item use / care-chain Counter step / star result screen / 3-star + chain bonus — all blocked by inventory-key mismatch bug)

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_sage, TEST_battle, TEST_chain, TEST_inv players via POST /api/player. Backend pytest fixtures auto-clean their created players via DELETE on teardown, but the 4 frontend-test players above were not auto-cleaned.
context_for_next_testing_agent: After main-agent fixes server.py starter inventory keys: (1) POST /api/player with name TEST_x, aptitude sage. (2) localStorage.setItem('clinica.playerId.v1', player.id); localStorage.setItem('clinica.coachmark.longpress.v1','dismissed'). (3) goto /battle?enemyId=air_sprite. (4) Tap 'Pattern Sight' (reveals 2 clues including Wheezing). (5) Tap 'Guardian's Touch' (stabilize). (6) End Turn. (7) Switch to ITEMS tab → tap 'Bronchodilator Mist' — should now consume 2 AP and reduce corruption by ~30 (was 80). (8) End Turn. (9) Back to ACTIONS → Reassess (0 AP — completes chain). (10) Keep using Bronchodilator + skills until corruption=0. (11) Verify navigation to /result?fullChain=1&unsafe=0&poorFit=0… and confirm 3 stars + 'STARS EARNED' card + 'Codex Shards' breakdown card shows 'Base X · Stars +Y · Care Chain +Z = total'. (12) For 1-star path: skip Reassess + Counter and win via brute-force Focused Lens striking — should give 1 star and no chain bonus.
rca_of_issue: RCA — Critical inventory bug: server.py:131-137 was written before the clinical reasoning layer renamed all items. The frontend's ITEM_CLINICAL map (in /app/frontend/src/game/clinical.ts) defines five new battle items keyed as 'Bronchodilator Mist', 'Glucose Spark Gel', 'River Bolus', 'Barrier Kit', 'Codex Lab Sigil'. When the battle reducer initializes inventory, it looks up these exact keys against player.inventory. Server returns {Albuterol Mist:1, Glucose Gel:1, Fluid Bolus:1, Isolation Kit:1, Lab Token:2} — none of which match. So inventory[key] = 0 for every clinical item. Reproduction: POST /api/player → GET /api/player/{id} → observe inventory keys are 'Albuterol Mist' etc. → navigate to /battle?enemyId=air_sprite → tap ITEMS tab → confirm all 5 items show ×0. Fix: update the inventory dict in create_player() to use the new key names that match ITEM_CLINICAL exactly. Optionally also add a migration / mapping for legacy DB docs that still have the old keys.
